title: Connections, Channel Ownership, Heartbeats, and Recovery · Independent Go Trial
summary: An independent Go integration team receives different topology, traffic, schema, tenant, dependency, and shutdown constraints and transfers the module into a new a cancellable connection and channel recovery state machine. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of a cancellable connection and channel recovery state machine with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence d…
objectives: Use bounded long-lived AMQP connections and explain multiplexed channels, negotiated limits, names, TLS, and lifecycle cost; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

Assign channel ownership by publisher or consumer lifecycle and prevent concurrent confirm, acknowledgement, and topology operations from corrupting assumptions; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

Choose a heartbeat timeout with network and flow-control evidence and distinguish heartbeat interval, TCP keepalive, and false-positive failure; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Long Lived Connection
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab Go messaging team handles case 3067 during outbox relay recovery after a database commit. Build deterministic Go evidence to bound heartbeat and recovery delay while rejecting stale channel-generation notifications; prove cleanup under a single deadline and cancellation cause; then raise a broker resource alarm and halt new admission. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

For RabbitMQ and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Long Lived Connection, keep Long Lived Connection connected to executable Go messaging decision evidence.
